description: First stable BSIP0 ingestion baseline. Covers Carrefour Israel bar-format snack products only. Raw data capture; no normalization, cross-retailer consolidation, or scoring.
known_limitations: shelf_card_only rows contain no nutrition, ingredients, or allergens — product page not scraped
serving_size_raw is often empty: Carrefour PDP rarely shows explicit per-serving information
package_size extracted from product name / card text; occasionally imprecise for multi-packs
discovery covers 3 shelf categories only (95814 חטיפי דגנים ואנרגיה, 96922 חטיפי דגנים, 95815 חטיפי אנרגיה)
per_serving_raw in nutrition_rows_raw is often empty for Carrefour products
Yohananof not included in this freeze: parity gaps documented in architecture review
barcode absent for 3 Carrefour private-label products (folder name = Hebrew slug)
click_resolve covers YES rows only; REVIEW rows keep no product_url until manually approved

artifacts.description: Same as JSON, two-sheet XLSX, barcode as text
Same as JSON, XLSX with barcode as text
Changes and decisions since initial prototype
